stateRisks.dominantManipulation: digital manipulation and urban collateral fraud

legalRegime.legacy: IPC forgery, cheating and fraud sections
legalRegime.modelingUse: The workflow should store law_regime so pre- and post-transition fraud labels remain auditable.

criticalFindings: Digitisation reduces walk-in corruption but creates a cyber-enabled attack surface for document manipulation.
Mutation tampering may surface years after collateral acceptance, which makes real-time underwriting review material.
Identity-document cloning and forged GST/PAN linkages amplify financial-statement fraud risk.
Metro cases are fewer in count but carry high-value exposure, while rural land-record disputes create long-tail NPA risk.
